steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The goal is explicit: emphasize a difference between the two compositions. The notes show each piece uses a different Native element — Live On, Heart of My Nation features a Choctaw hymn; Fantasy Aborigine No. 3 incorporates a Tewa seashell rattle. The correct answer must name what is distinct about each piece.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'In his two compositions... Ballard blends elements of various Native musical traditions, such as Indigenous hymns or instruments, with Western classical music.': describes both pieces the same way — no specific difference is named. ✗
  • Choice B — 'While both compositions integrate various Native musical traditions, Live On, Heart of My Nation does so by featuring a Choctaw hymn and Fantasy Aborigine No. 3 does so by incorporating a Tewa seashell rattle.': directly contrasts the two pieces by specifying which Native element each one uses. ✓
  • Choice C — 'Live On, Heart of My Nation and Fantasy Aborigine No. 3 are two compositions written by Ballard, a classical music composer.': identifies the pieces as Ballard's work but says nothing about any difference between them. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Ballard has different approaches to blending Western classical music with elements of various Native musical traditions, such as using Indigenous hymns and instruments in his compositions.': claims different approaches exist but never specifies what they are for each piece. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
